calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. BREANNE L. REESE, Esq. of Reese Law Group (Tel: 760-295-1238) for plaintiff/judgment creditor Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. (via Zoom videoconference);
Defendant/judgment debtor EVANTHIS RAFTOPOULOS (Tel: 415-685-6673) in pro per.

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting judgment debtor's Claim of Exemption in part. (See signed order for complete ruling.) A copy of the signed order is mailed to the parties and to the Sacramento County Sheriff's Office. (302/RBU) *****

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Evan Raftopoulos (415.685.6673; evanthis.r@gmail.com) Defendant in propria persona.
No other appearances.

The court notes there was not compliance with tentative ruling rule.

The court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to April 6, 2022 at 9:30am.

Clerk notified counsel for Plaintff.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
